backend/main.mo: Implements access-controlled user profiles and a contact form system with submission storage, admin-only retrieval, and permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: Defines a feature report describing removal of a footer attribution paragraph in FooterSection.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries of multiple frontend files for reference or tooling.
frontend/index.css: Defines global Tailwind-based styling with light/dark OKLCH color tokens and base layout rules.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point including meta tags and root div for mounting the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component assembling all portfolio sections with a sticky navbar and footer.
frontend/src/components/layout/Section.t: Reusable layout wrapper providing consistent spacing and container styling for page sections.
frontend/src/components/layout/StickyNav: Responsive sticky navigation bar with smooth scrolling, mobile menu, and a Hire Me button.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutSe: Animated About section showing introduction, strengths, skills, and optional additional details.
frontend/src/components/sections/Certifi: Renders animated certification cards using config data in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Implements a contact form with validation, animated visibility, and backend submission via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/sections/Educati: Renders an animated vertical timeline of education entries using portfolio config data.
frontend/src/components/sections/FooterS: Displays footer with social links and dynamic copyright text.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: Hero section with intro text, CTAs, social links, and a cache‑busted profile photo.
frontend/src/components/sections/Project: Shows resume and GitHub project cards with animations, tech stacks, and optional GitHub links.
Documentation describing the purpose of each section component and editing guidelines.
frontend/src/components/sections/SkillsS: Displays categorized skill cards with animations using data from the portfolio config.
frontend/src/config/portfolio.ts: Defines all portfolio content including personal info, social links, education, and project data.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGithubRepos.ts: Fetches and caches a user's public GitHub repositories using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity authentication, storing identity state and exposing login/logout utilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useInViewAnimation.ts: Provides a ref and visibility state for triggering animations when an element enters the viewport.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides a mutation for submitting contact form data to the backend and invalidates related queries on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind and custom styles defining theme colors, typography, animations, and UI utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentity providers.
frontend/src/types/github.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for GitHub repository and API error responses.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL and session parameters.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Provides simple validation helpers for required fields and email format.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme extensions for colors, typography, animations, and container settings. It imports plugins and customizes UI elements such as radius, shadows, and keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata, existing features, and pending feature requests for a portfolio site targeting GitHub Pages deployment. Includes state versioning and architectural notes.
